page_info.title: SignaMath | Sign and Variation Table Generator
page_info.description: Easily generate sign and variation tables with SignaMath

home.title: SignaMath
home.warning: SignaMath is at risk of closing soon!
home.warning2: Developing this website and paying for hosting is becoming difficult for me as a student. To keep SignaMath alive, please consider donating at
home.subtitle: The essential table generator
home.desc1: SignaMath is a website for creating sign and variation tables to study the signs or variations of a function.
home.desc2: Enter a formula in the input area to automatically derive it and generate its variation or sign table.
home.desc3: To switch from the variation table to the sign table, use the provided radio button.
home.desc6: are welcome to help me pay for hosting and continue developing the site.
home.desc7: If you need to use SignaMath offline, you can either clone
home.desc12: For any comments or suggestions, please use the contact methods available on my GitHub profile.

options.opt2: Study of the variations of a function
